    out = torch.matmul(weights, arg2)
    return out

    t0 = torch.nn.functional.linear(x, w_gate, bias=None)

    t3 = torch.mul(t2, t1)
    return t3

import torch

def attention_qkv(q, k, v):
    scores = torch.matmul(q, k.transpose(2, 3))
    scaled = torch.mul(scores, 0.125)
    weights = torch.nn.functional.softmax(scaled, dim=3)
    out = torch.matmul(weights, v)
    return out

import torch

def attention_qkv(q, k, v):
    scores = torch.matmul(q, k.transpose(-2, -1))
    scaled = torch.mul(scores, 0.125)
    weights = torch.nn.functional.softmax(scaled, dim=-1)
    out = torch.matmul(weights, v)
    return out

import torch

def fused_attention(arg0, arg1, arg2):
    scores = torch.matmul(arg0, arg1.transpose(2, 3))
    scaled = torch.mul(scores, 0.08838834764831843)
    weights = torch.nn.functional.softmax(scaled, dim=-1)
    out = torch.matmul(weights, arg2)
    return out

import torch

def fused_attention(q, k, v):

    scaled = torch.mul(scores, 0.08838834764831843)
    weights = torch.nn.functional.softmax(scaled, dim=-1)
    out = torch.matmul(weights, v)
    return out

import torch

def fused(x, weight):
    linear = torch.nn.functional.linear(x, weight, bias=None)
    norm = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(linear, normalized_shape=[3072], weight=None, bias=None, eps=1e-05)
    output = torch.relu(norm)
    return output

import torch

def fused_linear_norm_activation(x, weight):
    linear_out = torch.nn.functional.linear(x, weight, bias=None)
    norm_out = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(linear_out, normalized_shape=[2048], weight=None, bias=None, eps=1e-05)
    output = torch.nn.functional.gelu(norm_out)
    return output

import torch

def fused_linear_norm_activation(x, weight):
    a = torch.nn.functional.linear(x, weight, bias=None)
    b = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(a, normalized_shape=[3072], weight=None, bias=None, eps=1e-05)
    c = torch.nn.functional.gelu(b)
    return c

import torch

def fused(x, weight):
    linear = torch.nn.functional.linear(x, weight, bias=None)
    normalized = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(linear, normalized_shape=[2048], weight=None, bias=None, eps=1e-05)
    output = torch.relu(normalized)
    return output

import torch

def fused(x, w_gate, w_up):
    gate = torch.nn.functional.linear(x, w_gate, bias=None)
    up = torch.nn.functional.linear(x, w_up, bias=None)
    activated = torch.nn.functional.silu(gate)
    output = torch.mul(activated, up)
    return output

import torch

def fused_embedding_norm_relu(idx, weight):
    x = torch.nn.functional.embedding(idx, weight)
    x = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, normalized_shape=(512,), weight=None, bias=None, eps=1e-05)
    x = torch.relu(x)
    return x

import torch

def fused(idx, weight):
    x = torch.nn.functional.embedding(idx, weight)
    x = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, normalized_shape=(512,), weight=None, bias=None, eps=1e-05)
    x = torch.abs(x)
    return x

import torch

def fused(idx, weight):
    x = torch.nn.functional.embedding(idx, weight)
    x = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, normalized_shape=(1024,), weight=None, bias=None, eps=1e-05)
    x = torch.nn.functional.silu(x)
    return x
